creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #0)
I haven't had a chance to unpack the code to investigate/
modify yet (too much other port drama to deal with). Based
on your description; I'm going to need to include versioned
libraries in it's search. eg; the box I'm answering you from
is on 15, which indicates: /usr/lib/libssl.so.30 and:
/usr/local/lib/libssl3.so

I should be  able to attack this Monday.

Thanks again.

--Chris

P.S what version of FreeBSD are you running this on?
